title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 273.080 - License fastened to dog's collar
text:
273.080.  License fastened to dog's collar. — It shall be the duty of the owner of every listed dog to put around the neck of such dog a collar to which shall be attached with a metallic fastening the metallic plate aforesaid.
(RSMo 1939 § 14552) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 12875
